rule: main manuscript contains no concrete artifact path, file extension, or replay script names
released manuscript text contains no instruction/dialogue/evasion trace
main manuscript avoids code-font identifiers and function-like presentation
main section titles present the research system rather than repository mechanics
main text uses audit terminology sparingly rather than reading as an artifact checklist
abstract states problem, method, and evidence without relying on repository reading
introduction exposes a concise contribution list
submission text avoids side discussion about preparation tools
